data.title: Microservices Structure
data.description: WhatsApp uses a microservices architecture that allows independent services to function together to perform various parts of its operations.
data.technical_spec: Decoupled services architected with inter-service communication protocols.

data.title: Cloud Scalability
data.description: Designed to handle massive scale using cloud infrastructure to ensure uptime and reliability across the globe.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes distributed cloud providers and container orchestration for resource management.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption
data.description: Messages are secured with end-to-end encryption, ensuring that only the sender and recipient can read the contents.
data.technical_spec: Uses the Signal Protocol to encrypt messages.

data.title: Real-time Messaging
data.description: Architected to deliver messages in real-time, supporting multimedia and group communications efficiently.
data.technical_spec: Supports XMPP for real-time message delivery.

data.title: Cross-platform Integration
data.description: Supports multiple platforms including iOS, Android, and web through a consistent architecture.
data.technical_spec: Web client built using web technologies with QR code login for synchronization.
